message: 🔴 Middle East airspace partially closed — multiple NOTAMs active. Avoid DXB, DOH, AMM transit.
🔴 Iran/Iraq airspace CLOSED — EU/US carriers rerouting via Turkey or Central Asia corridors.
🟠 Northern Europe experiencing 30–60 min delays due to polar route traffic surge.
🟢 East Asia hubs (NRT, ICN, HKG) operating normally — recommended transit points.
🟢 Singapore Changi (SIN) active as major Asia-Europe bypass hub.
🟠 Lufthansa, Air France, KLM avoiding Russian/Ukrainian airspace — expect longer flight times.
🟢 Istanbul (IST) serving as key bypass hub — Turkish Airlines maintaining full schedule.
🟢 Addis Ababa (ADD) and Nairobi (NBO) confirming stable East Africa routing.
🟠 North Africa partial restrictions — Libya airspace active NOTAM. Morocco and Egypt routes clear.
🟢 Trans-Pacific routes (LAX/SFO ↔ NRT/ICN) unaffected — normal operations.
🟠 Central Asia corridor partially restricted — some carriers filing alternate FPLs via South Asia.
🟢 Reykjavik (KEF) reporting increased traffic — operating as polar route waypoint.
🟢 Oceania corridors stable — Qantas and Air NZ operating normal schedules.
🔴 REMINDER: Russian airspace remains closed to EU/US carriers — 3rd year of operational reroutes.
